name: Our Mother of Mercy Federal Credit Union
description_short: Member-owned federal credit union in Houston, TX offering checking, savings, loans, and digital banking services to 63+ members since 1954.
description_long:
Our Mother of Mercy Parish Houston Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative headquartered in Houston, Texas, with roots dating back to 1954. The credit union operates as a traditional financial institution serving a specific membership base in the Houston area and surrounding regions.

The credit union provides core banking services including checking accounts, savings products, online banking, mobile banking with check deposit capabilities, credit cards, and auto loans. Members can access services through a main office on Sumpter Street in Houston and additional branch locations in Houston and Victoria, Texas, supported by ATM networks for cash access.

As a federally chartered credit union, the institution operates under a member-owned cooperative model rather than shareholder structure. Membership is available to current members and their immediate family, creating a community-focused financial institution. The credit union maintains modest asset levels of $364,000 and serves a niche membership community.

This is a small, specialized credit union best suited for existing members and their families seeking basic banking services. Prospective members should verify current membership eligibility requirements and understand the credit union's limited footprint compared to larger financial institutions. The modest asset base and member count indicate a hyper-local operation serving a specific community rather than a full-service regional credit union.
address: 4000 Sumpter St ste a, Houston, TX 77020

company_info.headquarters: 4000 Sumpter St ste a, Houston, TX 77020

pros: Member-owned cooperative structure with no shareholders
Comprehensive digital banking including mobile check deposit
Multiple branch locations across Houston and Victoria, Texas
Credit cards and auto loans available alongside traditional banking
Direct phone support available at all branch locations
cons: Very small asset base of only $364,000 limits lending capacity and product offerings
Membership limited to current members and immediate family, not open to general public
Only 63+ members indicates extremely niche local operation with limited scale
Website content contains data inconsistency (references 'Orange County Teachers Credit Union' history)
Limited branch network with only 2-3 documented locations reduces accessibility
best_for: Current members seeking convenient local banking services
Families of existing credit union members
Individuals in Houston/Victoria seeking community-based credit union banking
diagnosis: Best for existing members of Our Mother of Mercy Parish Houston Federal Credit Union and their immediate family members seeking basic banking services with a community credit union. Primary caveat: extremely limited membership eligibility (must be current member or direct family) makes this inaccessible to general consumers, and the very small asset base may restrict lending and product capabilities.
